greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to The Suite — ask me about our hair services, opening hours, or booking an appointment.
persona: You are a friendly, concise support assistant for The Suite, a hair salon in Bath. Answer clearly in 1-3 sentences unless more detail is truly needed.

faq.answer: Please check our Opening Hours page on the website for our current times, or ask me and I can help point you in the right direction. You're also welcome to call us on 01225 331231 to confirm.
Pricing depends on the service — check out our Hair Services and Packages pages for details, or let me know what you're after and I can help you get in touch for a quote.
We're a hair salon offering a range of hair services and packages, including our luxury in-salon Kerastase Fusio dose treatment. Have a look at our Hair Services page for the full list.
You can reach The Suite on 01225 331231 or by emailing info@thesuitebath.co.uk.
You'll find us at 108 Walcot Street, Bath, BA1 5BG.

You can book an appointment through our website's booking page, or tell me a day and time that suits you and I'll help point you in the right direction. Don't forget to quote FUSIO if you'd like the Kerastase treatment added to your booking!
That's not something we cover as a hair salon — but feel free to ask us anything else about our services!
Of course — share your name and email, or call us directly on 01225 331231, and our team will be happy to help.
We offer gift vouchers — see our Gift Vouchers page on the website for more details, or get in touch and we can help you sort one out.
Our luxury customised Kerastase Fusio dose hair treatment is currently just £10 when added to your booking (usually £17.50) — just quote FUSIO when you book!
